text: Buildora helped us review 1,800 submissions in one weekend without the platform slowing down.
Our mentors love the judging flow. Less admin work, more time helping teams build.
Event day traffic spikes were smooth. The dashboard stayed responsive the whole time.
We launched registrations in minutes and filled all seats in under 24 hours.
The application quality filters saved our team from manually triaging hundreds of duplicate entries.
Real-time status tracking for applicants is the feature we didn't know we needed.
Participants moved from signup to shipping projects faster because the onboarding flow is so clean.
Buildora made our global challenge feel local for every city chapter.
No more spreadsheet chaos. Everything from team approvals to finalist picks happens in one place.
The platform feels made for technical communities, not generic event software.
Submission review is ridiculously fast. I can focus on projects, not UI friction.
Sponsor visibility and participant engagement metrics are finally in the same view.
Buildora gave our team confidence to scale from one local hackathon to a multi-region series.
The organizer workflow is straightforward enough that new volunteers can run operations on day one.
Our finalist shortlist process went from days to hours.
Students appreciated how clear each application step was. Drop-offs were way lower than last year.
We monitor everything in real time and still keep the participant experience simple.
Great balance between visual polish and speed. Nothing feels heavy.
From onboarding to final showcase, Buildora keeps both organizers and builders in sync.
This is the first platform where our event team and engineering team are both genuinely happy.
